calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR#7235. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Payne.

Petitioner: Anita Ventimiglia, was present.

Respondent: Saik-Wak Chow was not present.

Ms. Ventimiglia was sworn in prior to commencement of the hearing. The Court stated that it could not go forward without service. The matter was taken off calendar.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR#7235. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Whitehead.

Petitioner: Anita Ventimiglia, was present.

Respondent: Saik-Wak Chow was not present.

Ms. Ventimiglia was sworn in prior to commencement of the hearing. The Court stated that there was no proof of service and that the Temporary Restraining Order had previously been re-issued. Therefore, the Request for Issuance of a Restraining Order was denied.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Reset To Nov-09-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Regina Dennis/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead

Petitioner: Anita Ventimiglia was present in pro per.

Respondent: Saik-Wak Chow was no present.

The Court noted the Sheriff was unable to make personal service on the Respondent. This case is continued to November 9, 2011 at 1:30pm in Department 204 and reissued the Elder Abuse TRO. Reissuance expires: November 9, 2011. Order signed.
